quality_suggestions: Add more reactive_radical labels; current count is 3, target at least 10.
Add more nitroalkane_deprotonation reactions; current count is 2, target at least 3.
Add more radical_bromination reactions; current count is 2, target at least 3.
Resolve draft labels and manual-review flags before training MLPs.
Normalize mechanism labels before comparing per-mechanism metrics.
Either curate group labels for empty-label reactions or exclude them.
